description: Create a nightly GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA Nightly Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, a daily cron schedule, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact running on linux.24xlarge with a matrix of Python and CUDA versions to build and upload FBGEMM_GPU nightly artifacts to GHA, and test_and_publish_artifact running on linux.g5.4xlarge.nvidia.gpu with a similar matrix to test the artifacts and push to PyPI if conditions are met.
